name: tier3_control_enhancement_form
description: Tier 3 normalization path: body mentions an enhancement 'AC-2(1)'. _normalize_control_id converts 'AC-2(1)' -> 'ac-2.1' (lowercases AND maps parens to dot). Pins the catalog lookup form contract: catalog stores 'ac-2.1', regex finds 'AC-2(1)', normalization is the bridge. A regression that drops the .lower() or the paren->dot swap kills this case.

evidence.text: This policy covers AC-2(1) automated account management.
